results.title: More funding from PFAS settlements will be available for New Hampshire towns
results.description: New Hampshire has received a $4.68 million settlement disbursement from a lawsuit against Tyco Fire Products, LP, and Chemguard, Inc., which will be deposited into the New Hampshire Drinking Water and Groundwater Trust Fund to provide grants and loans to public water systems for water source protection and PFAS mitigation.

results.title: Ernest Nuamah delighted to return to Black Stars after long injury layoff
results.description: Ghana forward Ernest Nuamah has expressed his excitement after returning to the Black Stars setup following a lengthy spell on the sidelines due to injury. The talented attacker, who was ruled out for almost a year after suffering a serious injury, said he is delighted to be back with the national team and eager to [...] The post Ernest Nuamah delighted to return to Black Stars after long injury layoff appeared first on Ghana News Online .
